title: Eternal Dragon attaches sacrificed cards under source on summon

card.rawText: Requires 2 “Dragon” named or Dragon-type creatures to summon. Place the sacrificed cards under this card while on the field. If this card leaves the field or changes control, the cards under follow it.

plan.title: Eternal Dragon attaches sacrificed cards under source on summon
plan.summary: After a valid summon, sacrificed cards should be stored under Eternal Dragon and move with it if it changes zone/control.

notes: Use a fixture where Eternal Dragon summon requirement is already payable.
Action type currently has no registered runtime route.

steps: Summon Eternal Dragon using two Dragon-qualified sacrifices.
Apply a control-change or move-from-field action if available.
Inspect whether attached cards follow the source.

expectedAssertions.label: Second sacrificed card attached under source

manualVerification: If no attachment model exists, capture actual post-summon location of sacrificed cards.
riskNotes: Runtime route is unsupported; likely missing resolver/model support for under-card attachments.

coverageSuggestion.notes: No runtime route registered, but tester should verify whether summon pipeline has implicit attachment behavior.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
